Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class UserProvisioningConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.UserProvisioningConfig
public class UserProvisioningConfig extends SObject

Java class for UserProvisioningConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="UserProvisioningConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApprovalRequired" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectedApp" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ConnectedApplication" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ConnectedAppId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Enabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EnabledOperations" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReconDateTime" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredential" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}NamedCredential" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredentialId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Notes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OnUpdateAttributes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReconFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserAccountMapping" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
